'''âw-k-ch''' ('''kawakach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbitt|unbitt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbitt|unbitt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kawakach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwakach|thiwakach]] || [[word:jiwakach|jiwakach]] || [[word:shiwakach|shiwakach]] || [[word:kiwakach|kiwakach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwakach|thuthuwakach]] || [[word:jujuwakach|jujuwakach]] || [[word:shushuwakach|shushuwakach]] || [[word:kukuwakach|kukuwakach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwakach|thuwakach]] || [[word:juwakach|juwakach]] || [[word:shuwakach|shuwakach]] || [[word:kuwakach|kuwakach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwakach|thuwakach]] || [[word:juwakach|juwakach]] || [[word:shuwakach|shuwakach]] || [[word:kuwakach|kuwakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewakach|thewakach]] || [[word:jewakach|jewakach]] || [[word:shewakach|shewakach]] || [[word:kewakach|kewakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowakach|thothowakach]] || [[word:jojowakach|jojowakach]] || [[word:shoshowakach|shoshowakach]] || [[word:kokowakach|kokowakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowakach|thowakach]] || [[word:jowakach|jowakach]] || [[word:showakach|showakach]] || [[word:kowakach|kowakach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowakach|thowakach]] || [[word:jowakach|jowakach]] || [[word:showakach|showakach]] || [[word:kowakach|kowakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwakach|thĂŠwakach]] || [[word:jĂŠwakach|jĂŠwakach]] || [[word:shĂŠwakach|shĂŠwakach]] || [[word:kĂŠwakach|kĂŠwakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawakach|thathawakach]] || [[word:jajawakach|jajawakach]] || [[word:shashawakach|shashawakach]] || [[word:kakawakach|kakawakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawakach|thawakach]] || [[word:jawakach|jawakach]] || [[word:shawakach|shawakach]] || [[word:kawakach|kawakach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawakach|thawakach]] || [[word:jawakach|jawakach]] || [[word:shawakach|shawakach]] || [[word:kawakach|kawakach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawakach|shawakach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawakach|goshawakach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawakach|gokishawakach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawakachnĂŒ|shawakachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawakachnknĂŒ|goshawakachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakachnĂŒ|gokishawakachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawakachshĂ«|shawakachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawakachnkshĂ«|goshawakachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawakachshĂ«|gokishawakachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakachro|shawakachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakachnkro|goshawakachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakachro|gokishawakachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakachmu|shawakachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakachnkmu|goshawakachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakachmu|gokishawakachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawakachsher|shawakachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawakachnksher|goshawakachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawakachsher|gokishawakachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawakachng|shawakachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawakachnkng|goshawakachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawakachng|gokishawakachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawakachya|shawakachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawakachnkya|goshawakachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawakachya|gokishawakachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawakachyam|shawakachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawakachnkyam|goshawakachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawakachyam|gokishawakachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawakachnĂŒshĂ«|shawakachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawakachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawakachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawakachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawakachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakachnĂŒro|shawakachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakachnknĂŒro|goshawakachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakachnĂŒro|gokishawakachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakachnĂŒmu|shawakachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakachnknĂŒmu|goshawakachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakachnĂŒmu|gokishawakachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawakachshĂ«nĂŒ|shawakachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawakachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawakachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawakachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakachshĂ«ro|shawakachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakachnkshĂ«ro|goshawakachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakachshĂ«ro|gokishawakachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakachshĂ«mu|shawakachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakachnkshĂ«mu|goshawakachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakachshĂ«mu|gokishawakachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawakachronĂŒ|shawakachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawakachnkronĂŒ|goshawakachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakachronĂŒ|gokishawakachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawakachroshĂ«|shawakachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawakachnkroshĂ«|goshawakachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawakachroshĂ«|gokishawakachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawakachromu|shawakachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawakachnkromu|goshawakachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawakachromu|gokishawakachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawakachmunĂŒ|shawakachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawakachnkmunĂŒ|goshawakachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawakachmunĂŒ|gokishawakachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawakachmushĂ«|shawakachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawakachnkmushĂ«|goshawakachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawakachmushĂ«|gokishawakachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawakachmuro|shawakachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawakachnkmuro|goshawakachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawakachmuro|gokishawakachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
